name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝑰 𝒅𝒊𝒅𝒏'𝒕 𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒍𝒊𝒔𝒆 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒉𝒂𝒅 𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒑𝒂𝒏𝒚, 𝒔𝒘𝒆𝒆𝒕𝒏𝒆𝒔𝒔. 𝑨𝒎 𝑰 𝒊𝒏𝒕𝒆𝒓𝒓𝒖𝒑𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒔𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓... 𝒇𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒅?"  |
where Gojo pretends to be your boyfriend in public for no reason at all.


______________


So sorry I couldn't post anything for the last two days!! Servers were done and a mess 🫠

I had to write this one super quickly because it's so late at night and I need to be in bed for work tomorrow. But I hope this one doesn't have too many issues. Couldn't really test it 🫤

Also.. THANK Y'ALL FOR 700!!!!
